shapes.name: Business Actor
shapes.description: A business actor is a business entity that is capable of performing behavior.

shapes.name: Business Actor
shapes.description: A business actor is a business entity that is capable of performing behavior.

shapes.name: Business Role
shapes.description: A business role is the responsibility for performing specific behavior, to which an actor can be assigned, or the part an actor plays in a particular action or event.

shapes.name: Business Role
shapes.description: A business role is the responsibility for performing specific behavior, to which an actor can be assigned, or the part an actor plays in a particular action or event.

shapes.name: Business Collaboration
shapes.description: A business collaboration is an aggregate of two or more business internal active structure elements that work together to perform collective behavior

shapes.name: Business Collaboration
shapes.description: A business collaboration is an aggregate of two or more business internal active structure elements that work together to perform collective behavior

shapes.name: Business Interface
shapes.description: A business interface is a point of access where a business service is made available to the environment.

shapes.name: Business Interface
shapes.description: A business interface is a point of access where a business service is made available to the environment.

shapes.name: Business Service
shapes.description: A business service represents an explicitly defined exposed business behavior.

shapes.name: Business Service
shapes.description: A business service represents an explicitly defined exposed business behavior.

shapes.name: Business Process
shapes.description: A business process represents a sequence of business behaviors that achieves a specific result such as a defined set of products or business services.

shapes.name: Business Process
shapes.description: A business process represents a sequence of business behaviors that achieves a specific result such as a defined set of products or business services.

shapes.name: Business Function
shapes.description: A business function is a collection of business behavior based on a chosen set of criteria (typically required business resources and/or competences), closely aligned to an organization, but not necessarily explicitly governed by the organization.

shapes.name: Business Function
shapes.description: A business function is a collection of business behavior based on a chosen set of criteria (typically required business resources and/or competences), closely aligned to an organization, but not necessarily explicitly governed by the organization.

shapes.name: Business Interaction
shapes.description: A business interaction is a unit of collective business behavior performed by (a collaboration of) two or more business actors, roles, or business collaboartions

shapes.name: Business Interaction
shapes.description: A business interaction is a unit of collective business behavior performed by (a collaboration of) two or more business actors, roles, or business collaboartions

shapes.name: Business Event
shapes.description: A business event represents an organizational state change.

shapes.name: Business Event
shapes.description: A business event represents an organizational state change.

shapes.name: Business Object
shapes.description: A business object represents a concept used within a particular business domain.

shapes.name: Product
shapes.description: A product represents a coherent collection of services and/or passive structure elements, accompanied by a contract/set of agreements, which is offered as a whole to (internal or external) customers.

shapes.name: Contract
shapes.description: A contract represents a formal or informal specification of an agreement between a provider and a consumer that specifies the rights and obligations associated with a product and establishes functional and non-functional parameters for interaction.

shapes.name: Representation
shapes.description: A representation represents a perceptible form of the information carried by a business object.

shapes.name: Stakeholder
shapes.description: A stakeholder is the role of an individual, team, or organization (or classes thereof) that represents their interests in the effects of the architecture.

shapes.name: Stakeholder
shapes.description: A stakeholder is the role of an individual, team, or organization (or classes thereof) that represents their interests in the effects of the architecture.

shapes.name: Driver
shapes.description: A driver represents an external or internal condition that motivates an organization to define its goals and implement the changes necessary to achieve them.

shapes.name: Driver
shapes.description: A driver represents an external or internal condition that motivates an organization to define its goals and implement the changes necessary to achieve them.

shapes.name: Assessmen
shapes.description: An assessment represents the result of an analysis of the state of affairs of the enterprise with respect to some driver.

shapes.name: Assessment
shapes.description: An assessment represents the result of an analysis of the state of affairs of the enterprise with respect to some driver.

shapes.name: Goal
shapes.description: A goal represents a high-level statement of intent, direction, or desired end state for an organization and its stakeholders.

shapes.name: Goal
shapes.description: A goal represents a high-level statement of intent, direction, or desired end state for an organization and its stakeholders.

shapes.name: Outcome
shapes.description: An outcome represents an end result

shapes.name: Outcome
shapes.description: An outcome represents an end result.

shapes.name: Principle
shapes.description: A principle represents a statement of intent defining a general property that applies to any system in a certain context in the architecture

shapes.name: Principle
shapes.description: A principle represents a statement of intent defining a general property that applies to any system in a certain context in the architecture

shapes.name: Requirement
shapes.description: A requirement represents a statement of need defining a property that applies to a specific system as described by the architecture.

shapes.name: Requirement
shapes.description: A requirement represents a statement of need defining a property that applies to a specific system as described by the architecture.

shapes.name: Constraint
shapes.description: A constraint represents a factor that limits the realization of goals.

shapes.name: Constraint
shapes.description: A constraint represents a factor that limits the realization of goals.

shapes.name: Meaning
shapes.description: Meaning represents the knowledge or expertise present in, or the interpretation given to, a concept in a particular context.

shapes.name: Value
shapes.description: Value represents the relative worth, utility, or importance of a concept.

shapes.name: Resource
shapes.description: A resource represents an asset owned or controlled by an individual or organization.

shapes.name: Resource
shapes.description: A resource represents an asset owned or controlled by an individual or organization.

shapes.name: Capability
shapes.description: A capability represents an ability that an active structure element, such as an organization, person, or system, possesses.

shapes.name: Capability
shapes.description: A capability represents an ability that an active structure element, such as an organization, person, or system, possesses.

shapes.name: Course of Action
shapes.description: A course of action is an approach or plan for configuring some capabilities and resources of the enterprise, undertaken to achieve a goal.

shapes.name: Course of Action
shapes.description: A course of action is an approach or plan for configuring some capabilities and resources of the enterprise, undertaken to achieve a goal.

shapes.name: Value Stream
shapes.description: Sequence of activities that create an overall result for a customer, stakeholder or end user

shapes.name: Value Stream
shapes.description: Sequence of activities that create an overall result for a customer, stakeholder or end user

shapes.name: Application Component
shapes.description: An application component represents an encapsulation of application functionality aligned to implementation structure, which is modular and replaceable.

shapes.name: Application Component
shapes.description: An application component represents an encapsulation of application functionality aligned to implementation structure, which is modular and replaceable.

shapes.name: Application Collaboration
shapes.description: An application collaboration represents an aggregate of two or more application internal active structure elements that work together to perform collective application behavior.

shapes.name: Application Collaboration
shapes.description: An application collaboration represents an aggregate of two or more application internal active structure elements that work together to perform collective application behavior.

shapes.name: Application Interface
shapes.description: An application interface represents a point of access where application services are made available to a user, another application component, or a node.

shapes.name: Application Interface
shapes.description: An application interface represents a point of access where application services are made available to a user, another application component, or a node.

shapes.name: Application Service
shapes.description: An application service represents an explicitly defined exposed application behavior.

shapes.name: Application Service
shapes.description: An application service represents an explicitly defined exposed application behavior.

shapes.name: Application Function
shapes.description: An application function represents automated behavior that can be performed by an application component.

shapes.name: Application Function
shapes.description: An application function represents automated behavior that can be performed by an application component.

shapes.name: Application Process
shapes.description: An application process represents a sequence of application behaviors that achieves a specific result.

shapes.name: Application Interaction
shapes.description: An application interaction represents a unit of collective application behavior performed by (a collaboration of) two or more application components.

shapes.name: Application Interaction
shapes.description: An application interaction represents a unit of collective application behavior performed by (a collaboration of) two or more application components.

shapes.name: Application Event
shapes.description: An application event represents an application state change.

shapes.name: Application Event
shapes.description: An application event represents an application state change.

shapes.name: Data Object
shapes.description: A data object represents data structured for automated processing.

shapes.name: Node
shapes.description: A node represents a computational or physical resource that hosts, manipulates, or interacts with other computational or physical resources.

shapes.name: Device
shapes.description: A device is a physical IT resource upon which system software and artifacts may be stored or deployed for execution.

shapes.name: System Software
shapes.description: System software represents software that provides or contributes to an environment for storing, executing, and using software or data deployed within it.

shapes.name: Technology Collaboration
shapes.description: A technology collaboration represents an aggregate of two or more nodes that work together to perform collective technology behavior.

shapes.name: Technology Interface
shapes.description: A technology interface represents a point of access where technology services offered by a node can be accessed.

shapes.name: Technology Function
shapes.description: A technology function represents a collection of technology behavior that can be performed by a node.

shapes.name: Technology Process
shapes.description: A technology process represents a sequence of technology behaviors that achieves a specific result.

shapes.name: Technology Interaction
shapes.description: A technology interaction represents a unit of collective technology behavior performed by two or more nodes.

shapes.name: Technology Event
shapes.description: A technology event represents a technology state change.

shapes.name: Technology Service
shapes.description: A technology service represents an explicitly defined exposed technology behavior.

shapes.name: Artifact
shapes.description: An artifact represents a piece of data that is used or produced in a software development process, or by deployment and operation of an IT system.
